subcodes.first_line: O namesake of the Desired One! The melody of the Abhá Kingdom is raised high, and the song of the nightingale of faithfulness resounds in the rose-bower of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی حضرت مقصود آهنگ ملکوت ابهی بلند است و ترانه بلبل وفا در گلبن معانی روح
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
